name: Nakahara Chūya
description:
“Oh mind identifier! You are crazy.

Only you know what you think, idiot.”____________________________

After getting severely injured in a mission, Chūya lands himself in Yokohoma’s local hospital! Obviously hospital stays are dreary, but he finds himself entertained simply by the idea of you, the hospital’s friendly entertainer, and a fellow patient, who is in the ward right next to his! So one night his curiosity gets the better of him and he sneaks into your ward to meet you one night.

Or

Chūya did not expect our local friendly silly to be mute. How the hell did you even manage to entertain others so well if you couldn’t even speak yourself?!

____________________________

Content warnings: slight mention of Chūya being hurt and what his injuries are.

____________________________

“I just said a million things in my thoughts.

I said nothing infront of you.”____________________________

An: Guess who’s back by unpopular demand? Meeeeee :3

Anyways it’s another song fic, obviously. I should consider doing an English song next so that people actually understand this stuff.

Also, CHUUCHUU MY BELOVED. This man is the man of your dreams, do not deny it. He’s such a good boy istg.

How do I say it?”____________________________
